texto: Putting the brakes on is not an easy thing for a vamp to do. It's kind of like a shark trying to stop a feeding frenzy, or that old potato chip slogan: "Bet you can't eat just one.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jim Grayson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “Putting the brakes on is not an easy thing for a vamp to do. It's kind of like a shark trying to …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, humorous, vampire pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de vampire.
